response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals and recent exposure to relevant AI infrastructure (MCP, agentic frameworks at re:cinq), he falls significantly short of the role's core requirement: 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions. His 14+ year career is primarily in general software engineering with only approximately 1 year of AI-adjacent infrastructure work. Critically absent are Python expertise, demonstrated experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, data pipelines for ML, and LLM optimization—the technical foundations this staff-level AI role demands.
strengths: Strong TypeScript and full-stack development expertise demonstrated across 14 years in senior roles
Current exposure to cutting-edge AI infrastructure including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq
Proven staff-level technical leadership with mentoring experience and demonstrated ability to drive engineering excellence
concerns: Critical experience gap: only ~1 year of AI/GenAI work versus 8+ years required; career trajectory is general software engineering, not AI specialization
No Python experience listed despite it being a primary language for AI/ML development and explicitly mentioned in job requirements
No demonstrated expertise in vector databases, RAG architectures, ML data pipelines, or LLM performance optimization—core technical pillars for this role

key_factors.factor: AI/GenAI domain experience gap (1 year vs. 8+ required)
Recent exposure to MCP and agentic frameworks
